work.desc_title: John of Dailam and his miracles in Mosul; Maximus and Dometius

note: John of Dailam and his miracles in Mosul during the reign of the Omaiyads, and Maximus and Dometius the children of King Leontius

work.desc_title: Martyrdom of Qāyātīs, Aurāūs, and Cornelius the Centurion

note: Martyrdom of Qāyātīs, the woman-slave of King Costa of Alexandria, of Aurāūs and his seven relatives in Egypt, and of Cornelius the Centurion, the first of the Romans to embrace Christianity
